hero.description: Computer Science student at MIT-WPU passionate about building web applications, analyzing data, and solving real-world problems through technology. I enjoy working with Python, JavaScript, and modern web frameworks.

about.subtitle: AI Developer & Full-Stack Engineer
paragraphs: I'm Arnav Karwa, a CSE (AI & DS) student at MIT-WPU focused on building intelligent, scalable products. I love turning data, AI, and design into usable tools.

Currently a Gen AI developer intern at Harbinger Group, shipping and tuning AI models. Previously led full-stack work at IAM, speeding up databases by 500% and delivering data-rich dashboards across React, FastAPI, and Django.

Built 15+ projects across AI/ML, web, and data, from LLM prompt tools and finance agents to CV systems and analytics. I bring the same discipline from my black belt in Karate and district-level basketball to every build.

items.title: Harbinger Group
items.description: Currently working as a Gen AI developer intern, focusing on building and deploying advanced AI models. Involved in developing AI-driven solutions, enhancing model performance, and integrating AI capabilities into existing systems. Working with cutting-edge technologies to create intelligent applications.

items.title: Integrated Active Monitoring Pvt. Ltd. (IAM)
items.description: Led and solo-developed a comprehensive sales web app, managing full-stack development with React.js, Angular, Redux, FastAPI, and Django. Optimized database performance by 500%, significantly improved system stability, and built advanced data visualization solutions with Pandas. Implemented robust authentication, API security, and granular access controls.

items.title: Legitreach-Ad
items.description: Built campaign and analytics modules for a B2B ads platform. Implemented dashboards, API integrations, and performance tracking across Next.js and TypeScript with secure auth and role-based access.

items.title: BoardGame Meetups Pune
items.description: Started a board game meetup organizing company, building a community of 6k+ people and conducting 25+ meetups. Focused on hosting, logistics, partnerships, and keeping the community engaged.

items.title: Agrotech
items.description: Agriculture-focused solution that helps with smarter farming decisions using a tech-driven data/information workflow. Built with modern web technologies for data analysis and insights.

items.title: Prompt Master
items.description: Web app that reviews and optimizes prompts to improve the quality and consistency of LLM outputs. Helps users craft better AI prompts for enhanced results.

items.title: Automated EDA
items.description: Automated exploratory data analysis tool that generates key insights, statistics, and visualizations from datasets. Streamlines data discovery and analysis workflow.

items.title: High Speed Face Recognition System
items.description: Real-time face recognition system optimized for fast detection and identification. Implements advanced computer vision techniques for efficient facial analysis.

items.title: Dynamic Personal Finance Agent
items.description: AI-powered finance agent that tracks expenses and automates personal finance tasks with intelligent workflows. Provides smart financial insights and recommendations.

items.title: ClauseCraftAI
items.description: GenAI solution that summarizes complex legal documents into easy-to-understand language. Demystifies legal content using advanced NLP and generative AI.

items.title: AI Course Recommendation System
items.description: Recommendation system that suggests relevant AI/tech courses based on user preferences and interest signals. Uses ML algorithms to match users with ideal learning paths.

items.title: Real Estate Price Predictor
items.description: ML model to predict property prices using key housing features and location-based factors. Analyzes real estate data to forecast market values accurately.

items.title: Stock Market Predictor
items.description: A 7-day stock market prediction system using LSTM neural networks and sentiment analysis. Built with Python, Keras, and data analysis libraries.

items.title: Handwritten Number Identifier
items.description: Computer vision project for recognizing handwritten digits using Convolutional Neural Networks. Implements image preprocessing and pattern recognition.

items.title: Pharmacy Management System
items.description: Complete pharmacy management system with inventory tracking, customer management, and billing features. Built with Python and MySQL.

items.title: Inventory Management System
items.description: Object-oriented inventory management system built in C++. Features product tracking, stock management, and reporting capabilities with efficient data structures.

items.title: Restaurant Management System
items.description: Full-stack restaurant management solution to streamline ordering, menu handling, and table/customer flow operations. Built with web technologies and databases.

items.title: YouTube Dislikes Data Analysis
items.description: Data analysis on YouTube engagement datasets to extract trends, correlations, and meaningful insights. Statistical analysis of user engagement patterns.

items.title: Amazon Smartphone Data Analysis
items.description: Analysis of smartphone listings data to identify trends in pricing, ratings, and brand-wise performance. Comprehensive market analysis using data science techniques.

contact.intro: Ready to build something amazing together? I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message and let's start the conversation!

subject.label: Subject
subject.placeholder: What would you like to discuss?

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me about your project, ideas, or just say hello! I'd love to hear from you.

form.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. I'll get back to you soon!
